extDesc.message: Jot a note instantly from the toolbar.

placeholder.message: Select a note or create a new one

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

emptyNoteListDescription.message: Type in the note area below to save your first note on this device automatically.

onboardingGuide.message: Start by typing in the note area below. It saves automatically.

premiumLimit.message: The free plan allows up to $COUNT$ notes. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited notes.
